cap_note: no auto-mediated paid leg in this script; recording pays via the agent's own key

census.method: auto report --task inbox-agent (canonical determinism report, parsed)
census.raw_report:
determinism report — task "inbox-agent" (80 traces)
effectful spans: 320 (structural spans excluded: 80)
witnessed (signature observed >=2 across runs): 320 of 320 spans
  deterministic: 248 spans (77.5% of witnessed)
  divergent:     72 spans
  unwitnessed:   0 spans — no claim made
time-weighted deterministic fraction of witnessed: 68.6%
by kind:
  model_call: 240 spans — 168 deterministic, 72 divergent, 0 unwitnessed
  tool_call: 80 spans — 80 deterministic, 0 divergent, 0 unwitnessed
top divergent signatures:
  model_call(priority) input=a2ed55c4dc2d — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(priority) input=b79956e58374 — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(priority) input=ecf5be059553 — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(summarize) input=12b5c99ead33 — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(summarize) input=12f9938a2cbd — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(summarize) input=1817220e683e — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(summarize) input=1a1ae40f840e — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(summarize) input=22baee4f59ba — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(summarize) input=2af6ca6d78e5 — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
  model_call(summarize) input=4537763dceb8 — 2 observations, 2 distinct outputs, 0 errors
(fractions cover witnessed spans only; nothing is extrapolated)
census.per_span_method: script sqlite groupby (kind, name, input_digest) over non-partial traces, mirroring determinism.rs: deterministic iff witnessed >=2 AND zero errors AND one distinct output; the canonical report above aggregates per task/kind only

frontier_baseline.source: recorded root-span duration_ms + model_call reserved cost attrs; recorded = baseline (DESIGN.md); percentiles nearest-rank, script-side

classify.refusal_verbatim: auto compile: synthesis budget exhausted (300000 state(s), depth 8) — no fitting program in the v0 DSL; supply --module (hand-assisted) or wait for a richer search
classify.cmd: target/release/auto compile --contract evals/inbox-agent/classify.contract.toml --store target/bench/f2.db --synth enum --guard-field ticket --guard-alpha-milli 1 --divergent-pick most-common --out paper/evidence/bench\f2-classify.cbin --runs-dir evals/runs

priority.refusal_verbatim: auto compile: synthesis budget exhausted (300000 state(s), depth 8) — no fitting program in the v0 DSL; supply --module (hand-assisted) or wait for a richer search
priority.cmd: target/release/auto compile --contract evals/inbox-agent/priority.contract.toml --store target/bench/f2.db --synth enum --guard-field ticket --guard-alpha-milli 1 --divergent-pick most-common --out paper/evidence/bench\f2-priority.cbin --runs-dir evals/runs

classify_distill.cmd: auto distill --contract evals/inbox-agent/classify.contract.toml --divergent-pick most-common --holdout 0 (hand-run after the scripted enum refusal; exact differential 40/40)

priority_distill.refusal_verbatim: emit blocked - verdict FAIL: 3 divergent-reference groups fail the EXACT contract (e.g. 'recorded outputs agree for input #5 - 2 distinct recorded output(s)'); the wave-5 priority contract declares no acceptance threshold - 92.5%-deterministic behavior cannot pass an exact contract (the ADR-0018 motivation, measured)

h4_probes.accounting: false-abstain = heldout abstained; false-proceed = ood answered (the cardinal failure)

deviations: recorded 20 distinct tickets (track spec) vs DESIGN.md's >=40 corpus rule / 40-run pre-registration; F2_COUNT=40 restores it — logged either way

classify/priority contracts used VERBATIM (committed wave 5): each carries one example input outside the first-20 window, filled from the 2026-07-04 store — expected to constrain enum emits; the recorded verdicts in compile.* are the results
